items.title: Venice Biennale Bars Awards for Countries Facing Crimes Against Humanity Charges
items.summary: The jury said it would “refrain from considering” countries whose leaders are facing charges of crimes against humanity, which would affect Israel and Russia.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Slender loris electrocuted on power line near Dindigul
items.summary: S. Bharathidasan, secretary of Arulagam, says insulated cables or protective casing on overhead wires must be installed to prevent the deaths of the nocturnal primates
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: US appeals court rejects Trump’s ban on asylum seekers, teeing up appeal
items.summary: Judges say Trump's order for swift removal at the border 'cast aside federal laws affording' right to seek asylum.
